title: Refreshing Aerated Filipino Grape Tomatoes Salad
description: A light and refreshing Filipino-inspired salad featuring grape tomatoes, a splash of citrus, and a touch of spice.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine lime juice, ginger, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Cut the grape tomatoes in half and place them in a large bowl.
Pour the blended lime mixture over the grape tomatoes and toss to coat.
In a small bowl, mix together sodium alginate and water. Pour the mixture over the grape tomatoes and toss to coat.
Use a siphon or whipping siphon to aerate the mixture. Shake the siphon for about 10 seconds to create a light and fluffy texture.
Strain the aeroated mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl. Discard the solids.
Stir in chopped cilantro and basil. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Before serving, give the mixture a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the salad chilled or at room temperature.
